title: A biharmonic equation with singular nonlinearity
summary:
We study the biharmonic equation $\Delta^2 u =u^{-\alpha}$, $0<\alpha<1$, in
a smooth and bounded domain $\Omega\subset\RR^n$, $n\geq 2$, subject to
Dirichlet boundary conditions. Under some suitable assumptions on $\o$ related
to the positivity of the Green function for the biharmonic operator, we prove
the existence and uniqueness of a solution.

title: On source-type solutions and the Cauchy problem for a doubly degenerate   sixth-order thin film equation I. Local oscillatory properties
summary:
Local oscillatory and other properties of source-type solutions of doubly
nonlinear sixth-order parabolic thin film equations are studied.
